component.name: TelegramTUI
component.summary: Terminal Telegram client with a vim spirit

description.p: TelegramTUI is a terminal Telegram client with vim-style navigation and telescope-like fuzzy search. Navigate chats with hjkl, open any chat with /, switch to fullscreen with f, and never touch the mouse.
Features include normal and insert mode, reply/edit/delete, file downloads, folder support, message search, and sender search.
